Dashboard Archive: 2026-06-23 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker-Long AGX is dominating the long-term momentum rankings with a rank of 1 and score of 95.1, driven by extraordinary returns across all timeframes—1,437.5% over 5 years and 1,637.67% over 10 years—while maintaining perfect alignment above all four major moving averages. The ratio progression (4.13x from 1m to 3m, then 2.28x from 3m to 6m) shows AGX has sustained acceleration through multiple periods, though the deceleration in recent ratios suggests momentum may be normalizing. In stark contrast, CASY ranks second with more measured returns (308.15% over 5y, 600.72% over 10y) and a much lower 1-year outperformance versus SPY at 42.85% compared to AGX's 238.86%, indicating AGX has significantly outpaced broader market gains. Both securities pass all technical criteria and maintain clean momentum signals, but AGX's extreme long-term performance combined with its "strong_buy" flag positions it as the standout candidate in this dataset, while CASY appears to be a steadier performer with less dramatic short-to-medium term momentum.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
